"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Sandbox.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Sandbox.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Sandbox.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\mingw64\bin\X86_64~2.EXE -m64 -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Sandbox.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ..\bin\Sandbox.exe -Wl,--out-implib,..\bin\libSandbox.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Sandbox.dir\linkLibs.rsp
